parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ issue_id: $json.issue_id, subject: $json.subject, body_html: $json.body_html, authority_email: $json.authority_email, authority_name: $json.authority_name }) }}

meta.description: Generates a formal German letter to municipal authorities when a safety concern is detected. Triggered from Convex action; calls Gemini; sends the draft back to Convex for user review.
